description: A user-friendly SaaS wrapper for OpenClaw autonomous AI agent that simplifies AI automation through a web-based interface, providing enterprise features like user isolation, voice interaction, and template-based workflows for businesses and professionals.

evidence: README describes 'wrapper around OpenClaw, the open-source autonomous AI agent' indicating developer tooling
Architecture shows API routes (/api/invoke, /api/functions) suggesting developer-focused infrastructure
Documentation includes API contracts with technical endpoints for function invocation and management
Built by 'Corporate AI Solutions' targeting business/enterprise developers
Technical components like FunctionRegistry, PatchGenerator, and InvocationEngine indicate developer automation tools

growth_opportunities.description: Missing comprehensive analytics for tracking user behavior, feature adoption, and usage patterns. This would provide insights for product optimization and support data-driven growth decisions.
No sharing mechanisms for project results, achievements, or automation outcomes. Adding share functionality could drive organic user acquisition through social proof.
Missing team workspace functionality for sharing projects, agents, and collaboration on automation workflows. This could significantly increase user retention and expand account value.
No community marketplace for sharing and discovering pre-built automation templates. This could reduce onboarding friction and create network effects.
Missing clear usage tracking and conversion prompts when free tier limits are reached. This represents potential revenue leakage from users who might upgrade if properly prompted.
No automated email sequences for user engagement, feature announcements, or re-activation campaigns. This could improve user retention and feature adoption.
Missing comprehensive API documentation for developers who want to integrate or extend the platform. This could attract developer users and create integration partnerships.
No system for monitoring agent performance, uptime, or user satisfaction metrics. This could prevent churn and improve user experience.

revenue_leakage.issue: Free tier users may not hit clear usage limits that prompt upgrades
revenue_leakage.recommendation: Implement usage tracking and proactive upgrade prompts when limits are approached

revenue_leakage.issue: No trial period for Pro tier reduces conversion opportunities
revenue_leakage.recommendation: Add 14-day free trial for Pro tier to let users experience premium features

revenue_leakage.issue: Missing enterprise sales funnel for high-value accounts
revenue_leakage.recommendation: Create enterprise contact form and sales process for Business tier prospects

product_overview.tagline: User-friendly wrapper for OpenClaw autonomous AI agent
product_overview.value_proposition: EasyOpenClaw simplifies AI automation by providing a web-based interface, onboarding flow, and project management layer around the open-source OpenClaw agent. It eliminates technical complexity while adding enterprise features like user isolation, voice interaction, and template-based workflows.
product_overview.target_audience: Businesses and professionals who want AI automation without technical setup - including marketers, content creators, researchers, and teams needing automated workflows

features.name: User Authentication & Profile Management
features.description: Sign up, sign in, and manage user profiles with email/password authentication powered by Supabase.
features.usage_example: const { user, signIn, signOut, updateProfile } = useAuth();

features.name: AI Agent Workspace
features.description: Interactive chat interface to communicate with your personal AI agent, featuring session management and real-time streaming responses.
features.usage_example: Send messages to your agent and get intelligent responses for task automation and assistance.

features.name: Discovery Session
features.description: Interactive interview with an AI coach to analyze your workflow and automatically recommend personalized automation projects.
features.usage_example: Answer questions about your daily tasks to receive tailored project recommendations.

features.name: Multi-Channel Integration Setup
features.description: Connect your AI agent to various messaging platforms including WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Teams, and email.
features.usage_example: Select channels like WhatsApp or Slack during onboarding to receive AI responses on your preferred platforms.

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Create and manage automation projects with custom instructions and skill bundles for specific workflows.
features.usage_example: Create projects like 'Email Manager' or 'Daily Briefings' with specific AI instructions and capabilities.

features.name: Tiered Pricing Plans
features.description: Flexible pricing options from Free to Business tier with different AI model capabilities and feature access.
features.usage_example: Choose between Fast, Balanced, or Premium AI tiers based on your automation needs and budget.

features.name: Agent Memory & File Management
features.description: Your AI agent maintains persistent memory and can create, read, and manage files in its dedicated workspace.
features.usage_example: Agent remembers past conversations and can access files it has created or you've shared.

features.name: Voice Discovery Coach
features.description: Speak with an AI coach using natural voice conversation to discover automation opportunities hands-free.
features.usage_example: Switch to voice mode for a natural conversation about your workflow and automation needs.

features.name: Achievement & Progress Tracking
features.description: Track your progress exploring AI capabilities with visual achievement badges and completion metrics.
features.usage_example: Unlock achievements like 'First Chat', 'Project Created', or 'Discovery Completed' as you use the platform.
